task: Create a new Spring Boot + React starter project with minimal health endpoint and a simple React home page. Generate README with run instructions.

steps.input: Design the structure of a full-stack Spring Boot (backend) + React (frontend) application. Define: - Project root directory - Backend: Spring Boot app with /actuator/health endpoint - Frontend: Create React App with a simple home page - README.md with run instructions for both backend and frontend

Generate the complete project structure including: - Spring Boot backend (Java) with minimal health check via Actuator - React frontend with index.html, App.js, and basic styling - Package.json for React - README.md with clear run instructions for both parts

Create the project files in a local directory: - /backend/src/main/java/com/example/demo/DemoApplication.java (Spring Boot app) - /backend/src/main/resources/application.yml (enable actuator) - /frontend/package.json, src/App.js, public/index.html - README.md with run commands

Review all generated files for correctness: - Spring Boot app starts and exposes /actuator/health - React app renders a simple home page - README has accurate instructions to run both backend (mvn spring-boot:run) and frontend (npm start)
Summarize the project structure, key files created, and final output artifacts. Confirm all steps completed successfully.
